subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This handmaiden, with utmost humility, supplicates unto Thee, communing with Thee, O my God, through her inmost spirit and her outer tongue, and she saith: O Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذه وصیفه مبتهله الیک تناجیک یا الهی بلسان سرها و جهرها و تقول رب
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for protection, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
